summary: Completed testing of document upload, course image upload, and UI beautification features. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI features verified: Admin and Student dashboards have gradient banners, Course Editor has image upload, School landing page has document upload fields in application form.

issues: Console warning about HTML nesting - <tr> cannot be child of <span> - non-critical hydration warning (pre-existing issue)

passed_tests: Document upload endpoint /api/upload/document exists and returns validation error without file (422/400)
Document upload accepts valid PNG images
Document upload accepts PDF files
Document upload rejects invalid file types (returns 400)
Course image upload /api/upload/course-image requires authentication (401/403)
Course image upload works with admin authentication
Course image upload rejects invalid types like GIF (returns 400)
Uploaded files can be served via /api/uploads/{filename}
Non-existent files return 404
Public courses API /api/courses/public returns 200 with course list
Public course detail API /api/courses/public/{id} returns course with modules
Public course API returns 404 for invalid course ID
Admin login works correctly with admin@unilms.edu/admin123
Admin dashboard stats endpoint returns data
Admin Dashboard shows gradient banner (from-emerald-600 via-emerald-500 to-teal-500)
Admin Dashboard shows 'Welcome back, Admin! 👋' text
Student Dashboard shows gradient banner (from-violet-600 via-purple-500 to-fuchsia-500)
Student Dashboard shows 'Current Streak 7 Days 🔥' indicator
Course Editor shows 'Course Image' section with upload area
Course Editor shows 'Click to upload image' text with 'JPG, PNG, WEBP (max 5MB)'
School landing page shows 'Required Documents' section in application form
School app has 'High School Certificate *' upload field with data-testid
School app has 'Means of Identification *' upload field with data-testid
action_items: Fix HTML nesting warning in Dashboard.js - <span> wrapping table rows (pre-existing, minor)
critical_code_review_comments: File upload endpoints properly validate file types and sizes
Course image upload correctly requires admin/lecturer authentication
Document upload (for applications) correctly has no auth requirement for prospective students
data-testid attributes present on upload inputs in School app
seed_data_creation: Test documents uploaded during API testing (stored in /app/backend/uploads/)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All upload features verified and working. Backend uploads stored in /app/backend/uploads/. School app runs on localhost:3001. Admin and Student dashboards have enhanced gradient banners. Course Editor has course image upload in the right sidebar under 'Course Settings'.

features_verified.document_upload_api: PASSED - /api/upload/document accepts JPG, PNG, PDF files (max 5MB)
features_verified.course_image_upload_api: PASSED - /api/upload/course-image accepts JPG, PNG, WEBP files (max 5MB) with auth
features_verified.admin_dashboard_gradient_banner: PASSED - Green gradient banner with welcome text
features_verified.student_dashboard_gradient_banner: PASSED - Purple gradient banner with streak indicator '7 Days 🔥'
features_verified.course_editor_image_upload: PASSED - Image upload area in Course Settings section
features_verified.school_app_document_upload_fields: PASSED - High School Certificate and ID upload fields visible with data-testids
